name: Adaeze Okafor
quote: VisitLagos made my Detty December trip flawless. The Heritage Route let me trace my family's roots from Lagos to Ile-Ife — an experience I'll never forget. Everything was planned, all I had to do was show up and soak it in.

name: Marcus Johnson
quote: As an African-American visiting West Africa for the first time, I was nervous about logistics. VisitLagos removed every barrier. The cultural storytelling on the site prepared me emotionally for Badagry — I wasn't just a tourist, I felt like I was coming home.

name: Funke Adeyemi
quote: I've been to Lagos many times to visit family, but I never explored beyond Victoria Island. The Nature Route opened my eyes — Idanre Hills was absolutely breathtaking. I didn't know Nigeria had landscapes like that!

name: David & Sarah Chen
quote: We wanted something completely different from the usual Southeast Asia travel circuit. The Osun-Osogbo Festival was one of the most powerful cultural experiences of our lives. The sacred grove felt like another world entirely.

name: Chidi Nwosu
quote: The Detty December concert guide saved me. Got tickets to Wizkid, Burna Boy, AND the food festival — all through the platform. My friends back in Houston are already planning for next year based on my stories.
